name: ulpi-autonomous-engineering
description: Autonomous software delivery skills — bounded loops, fail-closed gates, deterministic enforcement, durable resume.

plugins.name: autonomous-engineering
plugins.description: The software delivery lifecycle as autonomous, loop- and workflow-driven phases: auto-spec → auto-plan → auto-build → auto-simplify → auto-test → auto-review → auto-performance → auto-ship, plus the converge-loop / adversarial-verify / checkpoint-resume / fan-out-work / budget-guard primitives, deterministic guard hooks, and runnable Workflow templates.
